---
name: Documentation issue
about: Report unclear, stale, incomplete, or inconsistent documentation.
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

Do not include secrets, tokens, private keys, customer source code, private
prompts, confidential materials, regulated data, local absolute paths, raw
logs, raw screenshots, raw evidence bundles, generated private bundles, copied
worktrees, or vulnerability exploit details.

## Page or File

Repository-relative public path or documentation URL only:

## Problem

What is unclear, stale, missing, or inconsistent?

## Suggested Change

What should be corrected or clarified?

## Validation

What sanitized evidence supports the change? Do not include raw logs, local
absolute paths, screenshots with private data, internal project facts, or
confidential materials.
